title: GridData
description: Data in the grid, as well as metadata about the dimensions.

startRow.description: The first row this GridData refers to, zero-based.

startColumn.description: The first column this GridData refers to, zero-based.

rowData.description: The data in the grid, one entry per row, starting with the row in startRow.

rowMetadata.description: Metadata about the requested rows in the grid, starting with the row in startRow.

columnMetadata.description: Metadata about the requested columns in the grid, starting with the column in startColumn.
